items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run for 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (about 130-145 bpm). Focus on keeping a conversational pace throughout the run.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:10 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes afterward. Aim for a heart rate of 170-180 bpm during intervals.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on lower body and core strength. Complete 3 sets of 10-12 reps of squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Include 3 sets of 15-20 reps of planks and Russian twists. Rest for 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run for 6 km at a pace of 5:50 min/km. Start with a 10-minute warm-up and finish with a 10-minute cool down. Aim to keep your heart rate in the range of 160-170 bpm during the tempo segment.
